purpose: Make browser-workflow cases independently executable from the item homepage route.

changes.objective: Verify that clicking the Dynamics 365 Community navigation menu item from the blogs page successfully navigates back to the homepage, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
changes.reason: The Dynamics 365 Community navigation action is defined from the blogs page.
changes.inserted_action: Click the "Discover events" navigation menu item

changes.objective: Verify that clicking the Dynamics 365 Community breadcrumb link from the blogs page successfully navigates back to the homepage, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
changes.reason: The breadcrumb link is only visible on the blogs page; browser:back would reset an independent case to homepage.
old_actions: Navigate back using the browser back button
new_actions: Click the "Discover events" navigation menu item

changes.objective: Verify that clicking the Local Forms link in the sidebar menu successfully navigates to the local election forms page, demonstrating a positive test scenario.
changes.reason: Local Forms is a sidebar link visible after navigating to the local-elections page.
changes.inserted_action: Click the Learn more button in the 2026 GENERAL LOCAL ELECTIONS card
